description: Style Note Carrying around a trendy and fashionable bag is not just about completing your outfit, you can also use your bag to make a style statement. This super cool and colourful choice from nike is a must have for your summer and monsoon collection. In varied shades of green, you can pair this with neutral colours like white, black, grey or cream, and match your shoes and accessories with your bag. Product Details A green patterned, half moon shaped, sling bag in many shades of green which includes light green, mint green and dark green One adjustable fabric sling to wear it across your shoulders or swing it on one side One main compartment with an internal zipped pocket and nylon lining One zipped pocket in front with a white Nike swoosh Material and Care 100% polyester exterior, 100% nylon lining Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 25 cm Width: 43 cm
